summary: Solid recording with a brief drop‑out, showcasing an exciting The Other One jam and early Satisfaction in a spacy spring ’82 show.
review: Both reviewers enjoyed the performance, noting the set’s spacey vibe, a standout drum‑driven jam into The Other One, and an early rendition of Satisfaction. The audio is generally clear with just enough audience ambience, though one drop‑out occurs at the end of the tape. Overall it’s a good capture of a fun spring 1982 concert.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 4‑star reviews highlight a strong performance and decent sound quality with only minor technical issues, leading to an overall high rating but limited review count.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and well‑balanced with enough audience presence; a noticeable drop‑out at the very end of the recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Spacy, fun spring ’82 vibe with good pacing; early Satisfaction followed by a memorable jam into The Other One.

band_member_comments.Drums: Space‑jam on the drums praised as a highlight of the show.
